sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.heading: PART II: TEMPLATE RELATED INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: Instructions related to specific reporting templates.

sections.heading: C 13.01 - Credit Risk – Securitisations (CR SEC)
sections.description: Details the reporting requirements for credit risk related to securitisations.

sections.heading: 3.7.1. General remarks
sections.description: General information regarding the reporting of securitisations.

sections.heading: 3.7.2. Instructions concerning specific positions
sections.description: Specific instructions for reporting different positions in securitisations.

sections.heading: 3.8. Detailed information on securitisations (SEC DETAILS)
sections.description: Detailed reporting requirements for securitisations on a transaction basis.

sections.heading: 3.8.1. Scope of the SEC DETAILS template
sections.description: Defines the scope and applicability of the SEC DETAILS template.

sections.heading: 3.8.2 Breakdown of the SEC DETAILS template
sections.description: Overview of the structure and components of the SEC DETAILS template.

sections.heading: 3.8.3 C 14.00 – Detailed information on securitisations (SEC DETAILS)
sections.description: Describes the columns and data required in the SEC DETAILS template.

sections.heading: 3.8.4. C 14.01 – Detailed information on securitisations (SEC DETAILS 2)
sections.description: Details the second SEC DETAILS template and its reporting requirements.

C 13.01.name: C 13.01 - Credit Risk – Securitisations (CR SEC)
C 13.01.description: Reports credit risk exposures related to securitisations, including originator and investor roles.

C 14.00.name: C 14.00 – Detailed information on securitisations (SEC DETAILS)
C 14.00.description: Gathers detailed information on securitisations on a transaction basis.
C 14.00.section_heading: 3.8.3 C 14.00 – Detailed information on securitisations (SEC DETAILS)

C 14.01.name: C 14.01 – Detailed information on securitisations (SEC DETAILS 2)
C 14.01.description: Provides a breakdown of securitisation positions subject to own funds requirements.
C 14.01.section_heading: 3.8.4. C 14.01 – Detailed information on securitisations (SEC DETAILS 2)
